prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-SAFEBOX-UB500 Product Type: SAFE Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: Silver Metal 12 Inch Security Storage Lock Box Safe Home or Business Description: Have peace of mind that valuable items will remain safe and secure with the ToolTreaux Silver Metal 12 Inch Security Storage Lock Box Safe with locking capability.

The lightweight, portable and stackable design allows this security storage box to be used just about anywhere a need arises; a great storage option to keep valuable items like money, passports, important documents, medication, ammunition, guns or jewelry safe and secure, whether for home security purposes or in a commercial or business setting.

The 12-inch metal lockbox is equipped with a reliable carrying handle, allowing for easy transport or travel when needed. And, due to its lightweight and linear design, moving it from car to office or from drawer to the desktop will be a breeze.

For everything from cash and prescription drugs, to tools or as a catch-all utility storage box, never worry about misplacing important items with the handy ToolTreaux storage box; whether tucked away or sitting atop a shelf, keep valuables discretely organized and in order at your convenience.

Box Dimensions: 4.5 x 12 x 4 inches Search Terms: home security business lock box storage with lid lockable trading card locking safety deposit for boxes money safe personal stack Features: - KEEP MONEY & VALUABLE ITEMS SAFE: The ToolTreaux lock box is a great storage option to keep valuable items like money, passports, important documents, medication, ammunition, guns or jewelry safe and secure, whether for home security purposes or in a commercial or business setting - THOUGHTFUL DESIGN: Weighing in at just around one pound, the storage box or lock box is surprisingly lightweight, stackable, portable and easy to maneuver; the box comes with a sturdy metal latch for locking so you can rest assured your items are secure (lock not included) - GREAT FOR HOME ORGANIZATION: For everything from cash and prescription drugs, to guns or tool storage and much more, you won’t have to worry about misplacing items with the handy ToolTreaux storage box; whether tucked away or sitting atop a shelf, keep important items discretely organized - PORTABLE LOCK BOX: The 12 inch metal lock box features a carrying handle, allowing for easy transport or travel when needed; and, due to its light weight and linear design, moving it from car to office or from drawer to desktop will be a breeze - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Metal; Dimensions: 4.5 x 12 x 4 inches; Weight: 1lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 12 Inch Silver Metal Security Lock Box Safe

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 12-in Silver Metal Lock Box Safe

anthropic.title_differentiation: Portable And Stackable, Carrying Handle, Lightweight Metal Construction, Home And Business Security Storage

openai.title_differentiation: Lightweight Portable Design, Lockable Metal Latch, Carry Handle, Stackable Storage, Home And Business Use
